overview: An immersive 3D Bhagavad Gita explorer with a divine golden cosmic aesthetic. Users can search slokas by chapter and verse, browse all 18 chapters, read Sanskrit texts with transliterations and multi-language meanings, and experience voice-enabled spiritual exploration in a visually rich celestial environment.
features: Full-screen 3D hero landing with cosmic parallax and golden particles
Sloka search by chapter/verse number with text and voice input
18-chapter navigation with summaries and full sloka listings
Sanskrit text, transliteration, and meanings in English, Hindi, Telugu, and Sanskrit
Audio playback for Sanskrit chanting on each sloka
Multi-language UI with dynamic switching and localStorage persistence
Immersive golden cosmic visual theme with Three.js animations
Responsive design for desktop and mobile
